Interface MerchantInventoryViewBuilder<V extends InventoryView>

Type Parameters:
V - the type of InventoryView created by this builder
All Superinterfaces:
InventoryViewBuilder<V>
@Experimental public interface MerchantInventoryViewBuilder<V extends InventoryView> extends InventoryViewBuilder<V>
An InventoryViewBuilder for creating merchant views

    • checkReachable

      @NotNull MerchantInventoryViewBuilder<V> checkReachable(boolean checkReachable)
      Determines whether or not the server should check if the player can reach the location.

      Given checkReachable is provided and a virtual merchant is provided to the builder from Server.createMerchant(String) this method will have no effect on the actual menu status.

      Parameters:
      checkReachable - whether or not to check if the view is "reachable"
      Returns:
      this builder
